# OntoSight (vendored)

Vendored fork of [OntoSight](https://github.com/yifanfeng97/ontosight) with critical-node topology panel support for Hyper-Extract.

Version **0.2.0** adds:

- `/api/rankings` endpoint
- Node `degree`, `importance`, and `tier` enrichment in graph storage
- Critical-node sidebar panel (`static/critical-nodes-panel.js`)
